name: python3-sshsig
title: python3-sshsig
summary: SSH signature verification library for Python
description:
SSH signature verification library for Python
This is a Python port of the lightweight SSH Signature format of ssh-keygen.
It provides functionality to verify SSH signatures according to the
specification used by OpenSSH's ssh-keygen utility.
.
Features:
* Verify SSH signatures
* Parse SSH public keys
* Handle allowed signers files
* Compatible with ssh-keygen signature format
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-sshsig because SSH signature verification library for Python.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-sshsig as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-sshsig with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-sshsig --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
